title: まだまだタキシング中？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I spot a lively trio while I'm out shopping.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Lotsa, lotsa pins! ♪ Cool, cute, and shiny to
boot! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I hope there are a ton of cute ones to pick
from! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
So this article wants us to make our school bags
unique with accessories? Being stylish sounds like
a ton of work.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You can't be a real grown-up without keeping up
with the latest trends. ♪ Probably.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
And decking out your bag with pins is what's in
now!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: If you wanna be in style, you need to know how to style! Wow, this magazine sure knows its stuff!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Jumping on the bandwagon is cool and all, but
you gotta make sure you're decorating your own
way.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, totes! You can't forget originality! Yippee,
I'm so excited now! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: You can do this, you two! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whaddya mean? We're all getting stylish today, Bono! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
We're already out shopping anyway, so why not
get some matching pins? That would be so
adorbs! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oooh! That sounds like so much fun! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's hunt down some cute pins for the
three of us!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan and Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yeah! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
And we've gotta make sure they're super unique
too!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan and Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yeah! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
And then, and then! Let's decorate our bags like
crazy so they're the coolest ones around!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan and Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yeah! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Let's get this started, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the end of the day, it's important to style
things your way. That goes for both fashion and
racing.
